summary: Phase 4 Voice Polish testing complete. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features working correctly - greeting has no 'ji', AI responses are natural, Hindi/Punjabi tabs produce correct language responses, TTS working, custom demo bar functional, Emergent badge hidden.
test_credentials: No authentication required for this app
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 Voice Polish complete. All features tested and verified: 1) Greeting is 'Hey! Welcome to Desi Road. What can I get you?' (no ji), 2) English AI responses don't start with 'ji' or 'hey here is', 3) Hindi tab produces Devanagari responses (53+ chars), 4) Punjabi tab produces Gurmukhi responses (67+ chars), 5) TTS returns 200 with clean audio (no Hindi primer), 6) Custom demo bar works, 7) Emergent badge hidden.

backend: POST /api/chat - Responses are natural and varied ✓
Full order flow English - No ji at start ✓
Full order flow Hindi - Devanagari response ✓
frontend: Greeting is 'Hey! Welcome to Desi Road. What can I get you?' (no ji) ✓
English chat response: 'Perfect, butter chicken cones coming right up! Anything else with that?' (natural, no ji) ✓
Hindi response in Devanagari: 'बटर चिकन कोन्स? बिल्कुल! और कुछ और चाहिए?' ✓
Punjabi response in Gurmukhi: 'ਸ਼ਾਹੀ ਲੈਂਬ ਚੌਪਸ, ਬਿਲਕੁਲ! ਅੱਜ ਸਪੈਸ਼ਲ ਹਨ। ਕੁਝ ਹੋਰ?' ✓
Try Now button works - shows 'Now demoing for: [name]' ✓
Order panel detects items from chat ✓

phase4_specific_fixes_verified.punjabi_gurmukhi: VERIFIED - Punjabi tab produces Gurmukhi responses (67+ chars)

elevenlabs_note: ElevenLabs eleven_multilingual_v2 supports Hindi but NOT Punjabi natively. Punjabi Gurmukhi text may not be pronounced perfectly by TTS. This is an ElevenLabs limitation, not a code issue.
